recommendations.title: The Great Train Robbery
recommendations.overview: After the train station clerk is assaulted and left bound and gagged, then the departing train and its passengers robbed, a posse goes in hot pursuit of the fleeing bandits.

recommendations.title: The Neighbor
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man in a stagnant marriage, finds his life upended when an attractive young woman and her seemingly abusive husband move in next door.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: Police officer Asger Holm, demoted to desk work as an alarm dispatcher, answers a call from a panicked woman who claims to have been kidnapped. Confined to the police station and with the phone as his only tool, Asger races against time to get help a

recommendations.title: Life of an American Fireman

recommendations.title: The Lost Valentine
recommendations.overview: A young and cynical female journalist learns love may transcend trials and time as she discovers a story that will change her life forever. When war separates lovers on their wedding anniversary Feb. 14, 1944 at LA Union Train Station, Navy pilot Nei

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: The Rose Seller
recommendations.overview: Monica is 13 years old and has already created her own world, on the street, where she fights courageously to defend what little she has: her friends, her boyfriend, who sells drugs, and her dignity and pride that makes no concessions to anyone. On C

recommendations.title: Miller's Crossing
recommendations.overview: Set in 1929, a political boss and his advisor have a parting of the ways when they both fall for the same woman.

recommendations.title: Toni Erdmann
recommendations.overview: Convinced that his daughter has forgotten how to laugh, a father shows up unannounced while she's living abroad and bombards her with outrageous jokes.
